intent: Concise hero skill schema preserving current availability, event, targeting, chance, duration, damage-pass, and widget concepts while removing current implementation-shaped boilerplate.

reviewNotes.2026-05-02: Renamed skill activation to availability and effect targeting.trigger to event. Split current skill_round_stackable into retriggerPolicy so it is not confused with same-event repeat limits.

skillAvailability.battle: The skill source is available for the whole battle. This is not the same concept as an effect event.
skillAvailability.cadence: For non-passive skills, the source is available only every N attack or turn events, with optional turn window.
skillAvailability.chancePct: Skill-level source availability chance, separate from per-effect chancePctByLevel.
skillAvailability.requiresSourceTroopAlive: Current skill_type_relation; the hero base troop type must still be alive.
skillAvailability.retriggerPolicy: Controls whether the skill source may create another benefit while a previous benefit from the same skill is still active.
skillAvailability.resolutionOrder: Current skill_order for unusual placeholder or sequencing cases.

effectEvent.by: Current trigger_for: all, once, first, friendly, or a troop type. This is the combat event that may instantiate a benefit from an available skill.
effectEvent.vs: Current trigger_vs; hero catalog currently only uses all.
effectEvent.note: A battle-available skill may still have event-gated effects. That does not mean the skill itself reactivates; it means the effect describes which combat event creates or refreshes a Benefit.

benefitTarget.to: Current benefit_for: trigger, all, friendly, or troop type.
benefitTarget.vs: Current benefit_vs: any, target, all fan-out splash, or troop type.

effect.type: Current effect_type, intentionally preserved for shared Benefit tracing.
effect.op: Current stacking/equation operation code, intentionally preserved for auditability.
effect.damageKind: modifier by default; extra means current extra_attack=true.
effect.damagePass: all by default; normal or extra maps current benefit_on.
effect.valueSemantics: total_damage_pct marks current effect_is_total_damage behavior where 120 means 20% extra damage.
effect.valueEvolution: Current effect_evolution as an explicit value rule instead of a special blob.
effect.triggerAction: Explicit action side-effect such as pause_triggering_attack.

vocabulary.widget: Skill slot 4 is represented outside combat skills because current widgets are uniform permanent stat bonuses keyed only by role, stat, and level values.

reservedButNotUsedByCurrentHeroCatalog.hpThreshold: Runtime checks special.hp_threshold, but no current hero skill file uses it.
reservedButNotUsedByCurrentHeroCatalog.onDefense: Runtime checks special.onDefense, but no current hero skill file uses it.
reservedButNotUsedByCurrentHeroCatalog.eventByFirst: Runtime recognizes trigger_for=first, but current hero files do not use it.
